runtime.notes: Uses the JDK java.net.http.HttpClient. Built and tested on Java 21 (LTS); requires Java 17+.

payments.notes: Pix + QR, voucher/boleto async, card via Payment Element -> pgct_ -> backend, 3DS next_action, full + partial refund, cursor pagination, sandbox status advance.

checkout-links.notes: The v2 contract exposes only POST; the returned data.url is the public identifier. There is no retrieve/list endpoint (not-applicable).

subscriptions.notes: Create/reuse customer, create/retrieve/cancel subscription. Renewal/failure/past-due/cancellation handled via the webhooks flow.

transfers.notes: Create, retrieve/reconcile, cancel when status allows; final state via webhook.

webhooks.notes: Dedupe by top-level event id, fast 2xx, offloaded reconciliation, redelivery ignored, business state changed only on confirmed events. The public contract exposes no signature; authenticity is established by reconciling against the API.
